Operation 'searchPlaces' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks detail about what types of places are returned, what inputs are required (coordinates), and what the response contains. Enhanced version clarifies the operation's purpose, expected inputs, and output structure for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Searches for places near a location, sorted by distance.
data.summary_suggestion: Search for places near a location
data.description_suggestion: Searches for places (businesses, landmarks, points of interest) near a specified location, sorted by distance. Accepts location coordinates and optional search filters. Returns a list of matching places with details including name, address, location, and distance from the search point.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks detail about what types of places are returned, what inputs are required (coordinates), and what the response contains. Enhanced version clarifies the operation's purpose, expected inputs, and output structure for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'validateAddress' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate, but description lacks critical details about what inputs are expected, what validation results are returned, and what the operation does with the address (standardization, geocoding). Added specificity about address components, return values, and geographic/customer restrictions for improved AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Validates an address. Currently only available for US and Canada addresses for enterprise customers.
data.description_suggestion: Validates and standardizes an address for accuracy and deliverability. Accepts address components (street, city, state, postal code) and returns validation results including standardized address format, geocoding coordinates, and validation status. Currently available for US and Canada addresses for enterprise customers only.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks critical details about what inputs are expected, what validation results are returned, and what the operation does with the address (standardization, geocoding). Added specificity about address components, return values, and geographic/customer restrictions for improved AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Calculates the travel distance and duration between an origin and a destination.
data.description_suggestion: Calculates the travel distance and duration between an origin and destination using routing algorithms. Accepts origin and destination coordinates, and optional routing parameters (mode of transport, etc.). Returns distance in meters/miles and duration in seconds, along with routing metadata.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too minimal - it lacks information about required inputs (coordinates), optional parameters, and the format/units of returned values. Enhanced description specifies input requirements, return value formats, and units to help AI agents understand what data to provide and expect.

message: Operation 'matchRoute' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary uses domain jargon ('snap') that may not be immediately clear to all AI agents. Description lacks context about the problem being solved (GPS inaccuracy), input format (ordered points), and output details (snapped coordinates, confidence scores). Enhanced version clarifies the operation's purpose, expected input structure, and detailed output for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Snaps points collected along a route to roads that were most likely traveled on.
data.summary_suggestion: Snap route points to actual roads
data.description_suggestion: Matches and snaps GPS points collected along a route to the actual roads that were most likely traveled on, correcting for GPS drift and inaccuracies. Accepts an ordered sequence of coordinate points (typically from GPS tracking). Returns the matched route with snapped coordinates aligned to the road network, along with confidence scores and road metadata.
data.reasoning: Summary uses domain jargon ('snap') that may not be immediately clear to all AI agents. Description lacks context about the problem being solved (GPS inaccuracy), input format (ordered points), and output details (snapped coordinates, confidence scores). Enhanced version clarifies the operation's purpose, expected input structure, and detailed output for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getDirections' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains the core purpose but lacks details about inputs (waypoint format, optional parameters) and outputs (turn-by-turn instructions, route geometry, metrics). Enhanced version specifies input requirements and comprehensive output details to help AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect in the response.

data.current_description: Calculates the most efficient route between two or more locations to visit in order.
data.description_suggestion: Calculates the most efficient route between two or more locations to visit in order, optimizing for distance or time. Accepts an ordered list of waypoint coordinates and optional routing parameters (mode of transport, preferences). Returns turn-by-turn directions, route geometry, total distance, estimated duration, and step-by-step instructions.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains the core purpose but lacks details about inputs (waypoint format, optional parameters) and outputs (turn-by-turn instructions, route geometry, metrics). Enhanced version specifies input requirements and comprehensive output details to help AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect in the response.

message: Operation 'geocodeForward' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Forward geocode' is domain jargon without clear action. Description lacks input parameter details and output structure information. Enhanced version clarifies the transformation (address→coordinates), mentions input flexibility, specifies response type, and provides use case context for AI agents.

data.current_description: Geocodes an address, converting address to coordinates.
data.description_suggestion: Converts a postal address to geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude). Accepts address components or a full address string as input parameters. Returns a GeocodingResponse containing the matched address and its coordinates. Useful for mapping and location-based services.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Forward geocode' is domain jargon without clear action. Description lacks input parameter details and output structure information. Enhanced version clarifies the transformation (address→coordinates), mentions input flexibility, specifies response type, and provides use case context for AI agents.

data.current_description: Reverse geocodes a location, converting coordinates to address.
data.description_suggestion: Converts geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) to a postal address. Accepts latitude and longitude parameters as input. Returns a GeocodingResponse containing the matched address and location details. Useful for identifying locations from GPS coordinates or map interactions.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses domain jargon without clarity. Description lacks specificity about input parameters and output structure. message: Operation 'geocodeIP' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary 'IP geocode' is vague jargon. Description lacks clarity about automatic IP detection and response structure. Enhanced version clarifies that no explicit input is needed (uses request IP), specifies output details, identifies response type, and explains use case for AI agents.

data.current_description: Geocodes the requester's IP, converting IP address to city, state, and country.
data.summary_suggestion: Determine location from requester's IP address
data.description_suggestion: Determines the geographic location of the requester's IP address, converting it to city, state, and country information. No input parameters required - uses the IP address of the incoming request. Returns an IPGeocodingResponse containing location details. Useful for geolocation-based features without explicit user location input.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'IP geocode' is vague jargon. Description lacks clarity about automatic IP detection and response structure. Enhanced version clarifies that no explicit input is needed (uses request IP), specifies output details, identifies response type, and explains use case for AI agents.

data.current_description: Autocompletes partial addresses and place names, sorted by relevance and proximity.
data.description_suggestion: Autocompletes partial addresses and place names as users type, returning suggestions sorted by relevance and proximity to an optional reference location. Accepts a partial query string and optional location parameters. Returns an AutocompleteResponse containing matching address and place suggestions. Useful for search interfaces and location input forms.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description mentions sorting criteria but lacks input/output details and use case context. data.current_description: Searches for users near a location, sorted by distance.
data.description_suggestion: Searches for tracked users near a specified location, returning results sorted by distance. Accepts location coordinates and optional search radius parameters. Returns a UsersResponse containing matching user objects with their current locations and distances. Requires secret key authentication. Useful for proximity-based user discovery and location-aware features.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description lacks input parameter details, output structure information, and authentication requirements. data.current_description: Searches for geofences near a location, sorted by distance.

Operation 'searchPlaces' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Enhanced version clarifies the operation's purpose, expected inputs, and output structure for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Searches for places near a location, sorted by distance.
data.summary_suggestion: Search for places near a location
data.description_suggestion: Searches for places (businesses, landmarks, points of interest) near a specified location, sorted by distance. Accepts location coordinates and optional search filters. Returns a list of matching places with details including name, address, location, and distance from the search point.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks detail about what types of places are returned, what inputs are required (coordinates), and what the response contains. Enhanced version clarifies the operation's purpose, expected inputs, and output structure for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'validateAddress' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate, but description lacks critical details about what inputs are expected, what validation results are returned, and what the operation does with the address (standardization, geocoding). data.current_description: Validates an address. Currently only available for US and Canada addresses for enterprise customers.
data.description_suggestion: Validates and standardizes an address for accuracy and deliverability. Accepts address components (street, city, state, postal code) and returns validation results including standardized address format, geocoding coordinates, and validation status. Currently available for US and Canada addresses for enterprise customers only.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks critical details about what inputs are expected, what validation results are returned, and what the operation does with the address (standardization, geocoding). data.current_description: Calculates the travel distance and duration between an origin and a destination.
data.description_suggestion: Calculates the travel distance and duration between an origin and destination using routing algorithms. Accepts origin and destination coordinates, and optional routing parameters (mode of transport, etc.). Returns distance in meters/miles and duration in seconds, along with routing metadata.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too minimal - it lacks information about required inputs (coordinates), optional parameters, and the format/units of returned values. message: Operation 'matchRoute' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary uses domain jargon ('snap') that may not be immediately clear to all AI agents. Description lacks context about the problem being solved (GPS inaccuracy), input format (ordered points), and output details (snapped coordinates, confidence scores). data.current_description: Snaps points collected along a route to roads that were most likely traveled on.
data.summary_suggestion: Snap route points to actual roads
data.description_suggestion: Matches and snaps GPS points collected along a route to the actual roads that were most likely traveled on, correcting for GPS drift and inaccuracies. Accepts an ordered sequence of coordinate points (typically from GPS tracking). Returns the matched route with snapped coordinates aligned to the road network, along with confidence scores and road metadata.
data.reasoning: Summary uses domain jargon ('snap') that may not be immediately clear to all AI agents. Description lacks context about the problem being solved (GPS inaccuracy), input format (ordered points), and output details (snapped coordinates, confidence scores). Enhanced version clarifies the operation's purpose, expected input structure, and detailed output for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getDirections' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. data.current_description: Calculates the most efficient route between two or more locations to visit in order.
data.description_suggestion: Calculates the most efficient route between two or more locations to visit in order, optimizing for distance or time. Accepts an ordered list of waypoint coordinates and optional routing parameters (mode of transport, preferences). Returns turn-by-turn directions, route geometry, total distance, estimated duration, and step-by-step instructions.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains the core purpose but lacks details about inputs (waypoint format, optional parameters) and outputs (turn-by-turn instructions, route geometry, metrics). Enhanced version specifies input requirements and comprehensive output details to help AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect in the response.

data.current_description: Geocodes an address, converting address to coordinates.
data.description_suggestion: Converts a postal address to geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude). Accepts address components or a full address string as input parameters. Returns a GeocodingResponse containing the matched address and its coordinates. Useful for mapping and location-based services.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Forward geocode' is domain jargon without clear action. Description lacks input parameter details and output structure information. Enhanced version clarifies the transformation (address→coordinates), mentions input flexibility, specifies response type, and provides use case context for AI agents.

data.current_description: Reverse geocodes a location, converting coordinates to address.
data.description_suggestion: Converts geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) to a postal address. Accepts latitude and longitude parameters as input. Returns a GeocodingResponse containing the matched address and location details. Useful for identifying locations from GPS coordinates or map interactions.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses domain jargon without clarity. Description lacks specificity about input parameters and output structure. message: Operation 'geocodeIP' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary 'IP geocode' is vague jargon. Enhanced version clarifies that no explicit input is needed (uses request IP), specifies output details, identifies response type, and explains use case for AI agents.

data.current_description: Geocodes the requester's IP, converting IP address to city, state, and country.
data.summary_suggestion: Determine location from requester's IP address
data.description_suggestion: Determines the geographic location of the requester's IP address, converting it to city, state, and country information. No input parameters required - uses the IP address of the incoming request. Returns an IPGeocodingResponse containing location details. Useful for geolocation-based features without explicit user location input.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'IP geocode' is vague jargon. Description lacks clarity about automatic IP detection and response structure. Enhanced version clarifies that no explicit input is needed (uses request IP), specifies output details, identifies response type, and explains use case for AI agents.

data.current_description: Autocompletes partial addresses and place names, sorted by relevance and proximity.
data.description_suggestion: Autocompletes partial addresses and place names as users type, returning suggestions sorted by relevance and proximity to an optional reference location. Accepts a partial query string and optional location parameters. Returns an AutocompleteResponse containing matching address and place suggestions. Useful for search interfaces and location input forms.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description mentions sorting criteria but lacks input/output details and use case context. data.current_description: Searches for users near a location, sorted by distance.
